description_text: Product Description 4pcs Carbon Fiber Look ABS Car Modified Rear Bumper Diffuser Spoiler Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Add our listing to Watchlist Or Add to Cart , you will get more discount Features: Brand new. Made of ABS material, durable and high-strength. Universal fit on the rear bumper of most models. The screw is used to reinforce the fixing to make it more stable. Installation Position: rear bumper Description: Material: ABS Color: Carbon fiber Size: as picture show Package Includes: 4 x Lip Spoiler(With accessories) Note: 1. All pictures have been professionally calibrated, but due to the ambient light and different display device settings, the pictures and items you see may have some deviations, please forgive me. 2. The data is manually measured, there may be some deviations, but it does not affect the use.
